---
title: Books
---

Some favorites.

# Nonfiction

The Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, *Carlo M. Cipolla*  

The Selfish Gene, *Richard Dawkins*  

The Spirit Catches You and You Fall Down, *Anne Fadiman*  

What My Bones Know: A Memoir of Healing from Complex Trauma, *Stephanie Foo*  

Being Mortal, *Atul Gawande*  

How Doctors Think, *Jerome Groopman*  

The Machinery of Life, *David S. Goodsell*  

When Breath Becomes Air, *Paul Kalanithi*  

I Contain Multitudes: The Microbes Within Us and a Grander View of Life, *Ed Yong*  

# Fiction

In the Country of Last Things, *Paul Auster*

A Man Called Ove, *Fredrik Backman*

Great Expectations, *Charles Dickens*

The Place of Shells, *Mai Ishizawa*

The Ones Who Walk Away from Omelas, *Ursula K. Le Guin*

1Q84, *Haruki Murakami*

1984, *George Orwell*

Bel Canto, *Ann Patchett*

The Little Prince, *Antoine de Saint-Exupéry*

The Catcher in the Rye, *J. D. Salinger*

Kusamakura, *Natsume Sōseki*

The Death of Ivan Ilyich, *Leo Tolstoy*
